title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Nimbus Post

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Nimbus Post
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
